heading: Periodic report on positions in the intelligence community that can be conducted without access to classified information, networks, or facilities
label: 3352e Periodic report on positions in the intelligence community that can be conducted without access to classified information, networks, or facilities
text: Not later than 180 days after , and biennially thereafter, the Director of National Intelligence shall submit to the congressional intelligence committees a report that reviews the intelligence community for which positions can be conducted without access to classified information, networks, or facilities, or may only require a security clearance at the secret level. Such report shall take into account the potential effect of maintaining continuity of operations during a covered national emergency (as defined by ) and the assessed needs of the intelligence community to maintain such continuity of operations.December 20, 2019section 3316b of this title
notes: Amendments2022— substituted “, and biennially thereafter,” for “, and not less frequently than once every 5 years thereafter,” and inserted at end “Such report shall take into account the potential effect of maintaining continuity of operations during a covered national emergency (as defined by ) and the assessed needs of the intelligence community to maintain such continuity of operations.”Pub. L. 117–103section 3316b of this titleDecember 20, 2019December 20, 2019
